subcodes.first_line: We have seen and perused the letter of Nabíl, son of Nabíl - upon him be God's peace - and have hearkened unto it. Praise be unto God, adorned with the embellishment of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه جناب نبیل بن نبیل علیه سلام الله را دیدیم و شنیدیم لله الحمد بطراز حب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
